description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php Docker image globally and runs a before_script that updates apt, installs git and unzip, downloads Composer to /usr/local/bin/composer, makes it executable, and runs composer install --prefer-dist -n -q. Define a deploy stage and a test stage (default) and add a packagist job in the deploy stage that overrides the image with tutum/curl, runs only on tag pipelines, and executes a curl -XPOST request to https://packagist.org/api/update-package with the username b17 and the $PACKAGIST_API_TOKEN variable, sending a JSON body containing the repository URL https://gitlab.com/vnphp/fineproxy. Add a phpcs job (allowed to fail) in the test stage that runs curl -OL https://squizlabs.github.io/PHP_CodeSniffer/phpcs.phar to download phpcs.phar and then runs php phpcs.phar --standard=psr2 src/. Add a test:5 job that uses the php:5 image and runs ./vendor/bin/phpunit, and a test:latest job that uses the default php image and runs ./vendor/bin/phpunit.
